title: Title
confirm_delete_card: Are you sure you want to delete the card "{0}"?
confirm_delete_section: Are you sure you want to delete the section "{0}"? All cards within this section will also be deleted.
select_local_image: Choose an image from this computer
local_image_missing: This local image is not available on this device. Import a full backup or select it again.
invalid_image: The selected file is not a valid image.
save_card_error: The card could not be saved. Please try again.
export_error: The backup could not be created.
import_error: The backup is invalid or could not be imported.
drive_subtitle: Sync Portal Atlas with your Google Drive account to enjoy better features:
drive_benefit_devices: Sync your custom bookmarks across all your devices.
drive_benefit_quality: Keep a sharper copy of each image.
drive_benefit_offline: Create and save more customized cards.
drive_behavior_note_storage: Google Chrome extensions have very limited local storage. Therefore, synchronizing with Google Drive is recommended because it greatly expands storage capacity.
drive_behavior_note_private: only stores a private copy of your custom images in your Drive and
drive_behavior_note_files: to the rest of your personal Google Drive files.
drive_not_configured: This build still needs its publisher OAuth Client ID before Drive can be connected.
drive_not_configured_detail: The extension publisher must add the Google OAuth Client ID to manifest.json. End users will only need to press Connect.
drive_disconnect_confirm: Disconnect Google Drive? Images already downloaded will remain available on this device.
drive_connect_error: Google Drive could not be connected. Check your connection and try again.
drive_status_disconnected_detail: Portal Atlas works normally without Drive.
drive_status_connected_detail: Images are ready to synchronize privately.
drive_status_syncing_detail: Local copies remain usable during synchronization.
drive_status_offline_detail: Cached images remain visible; pending changes will resume automatically.
drive_status_authorization_detail: Connect again to renew Google Drive access.
drive_status_error_detail: The operation will be retried later.
